docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY DIALLO, FALLAYE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SHEKNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SHEKNON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, SHEKNON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR FRENCH INTERPRETER TO JUL-18-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FALLAYE DIALLO IS PRSENT. DEFENDANT SHEKNON TAM IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY BANNIE CAOW, CERTIFEID CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIALLO, FALLAYE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, SHEKNON $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2017 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUN-16-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FALLAYE DIALLO IS PRSENT. DEFENDANT SHEKNON TAM IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY HIS SON ANDY TAM WITH CANTONESE TRANSLATION. ANDY TAM GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF FALLAYE DIALLO IS PRSENT. ASSISTED BY CHARLES LEGLER CERTIFIED COURT FRENCH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT SHEKNON TAM IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY BANNIE CAOW, CERTIFEID CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
